summary: SINGLE_FOCUS softmax Jacobian for 4 classes. 4×4 heatmap of ∂p_i/∂z_j = p_i(δ_ij - p_j); diagonal GREEN (positive), off-diagonal RED (negative). ValueTracker scale_tr multiplies logits by {0.5, 1.5, 3.0, 0.1, 5.0, 1.0} showing Jacobian dynamics: high scale → near-one-hot → small gradients. Live p_1..p_4.
